productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Grey Shoes
description: Perfect for those casual days, this suede high-ankle desert boot is a comfortable footwear option every man should incorporate in his wardrobe. Upper Suede upper for absolute style, comfort and breathability High-ankle for upper foot protection and support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Long leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for a comfortable, abrasion-free wear Leather inner lining of the collar for a comfortable wear Stitch detailing for support and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a wooden finish on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the back heel for grip on smooth surfaces Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style, with a wood effect finish on the outside shoe care Use a suede brush to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
